name: maxtac-binary
description: Binary and systems reverse engineering, dynamic debugging, and native fuzzing workflows for MaxTAC research.

interface.shortDescription: Binary RE, debugging, and systems fuzzing.
interface.longDescription: MaxTAC for Binary adds Ghidra, radare2, native debugger, instrumentation, crash replay, and systems fuzzing guidance without loading web, supply-chain, Android, Apple, or Microsoft workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use MaxTAC for Binary to triage this authorized binary target.
Use MaxTAC for Binary to capture repeatable crash or RE evidence.
